examples.exam_en: I bought toothpaste, shampoo, soap, and whatnot.
examples.exam_ko: 나는 치약, 샴푸, 비누 등 이것저것을 샀다.

examples.exam_en: The company purveys food to the military.
She has a winsome smile that charms everyone.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 모두를 매료시키는 매력적인 미소를 가졌다.

examples.exam_en: We were packed like sardines on the subway.
examples.exam_ko: 우리는 지하철에서 정어리처럼 빽빽이 들어차 있었다.

examples.exam_en: The demonstrators chanted slogans as they marched.
The enemy was defeated by a panzer division.
He kept picking at the scab on his knee.
Students imbibe knowledge through reading.
He was seen as the savior of the nation.
He read the novel again with great relish.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 그 소설을 큰 즐거움으로 다시 읽었다.

examples.exam_en: She does not relish working late at night.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 밤늦게 일하는 것을 좋아하지 않는다.

examples.exam_en: The restoration of the old temple took years.
His full restoration from illness surprised everyone.
examples.exam_ko: 그의 완전한 건강 회복은 모두를 놀라게 했다.

examples.exam_en: The comedian used satire to mock corrupt officials.
examples.exam_ko: 그 코미디언은 부패한 관리들을 조롱하기 위해 풍자를 사용했다.

examples.exam_en: The novel is a sharp satire on modern politics.
examples.exam_ko: 그 소설은 현대 정치에 대한 날카로운 풍자다.

examples.exam_en: Green algae covered the surface of the pond.
The lake was thick with green algae and smelled bad.
examples.exam_ko: 호수는 초록 조류로 가득 차 악취가 났다.

examples.exam_en: My boots got completely muddy after the rain.
examples.exam_ko: 비가 온 후 내 구두는 완전히 진흙투성이가 됐다.

examples.exam_en: The painting had a muddy tone that dulled the whole piece.
examples.exam_ko: 그 그림은 전체 작품을 흐리게 만드는 칙칙한 색조를 띠었다.

examples.exam_en: There was a sudden surge of interest in the topic.
examples.exam_ko: 그 주제에 대한 관심이 갑자기 급증했다.

examples.exam_en: A surge of smoke rose from the building.
He redeemed the loan before the deadline.
She redeemed her watch from the pawnshop.
This coupon can be redeemed at any of our stores.
examples.exam_ko: 이 쿠폰은 저희 매장 어디서나 사용할 수 있습니다.

examples.exam_en: The hunter set a snare to catch the rabbit.
He was caught in the snare of his own lies.
She applied an antiseptic to the wound.
This antiseptic treatment works on most surfaces.
examples.exam_ko: 이 방부 처리는 대부분의 표면에 효과가 있다.

examples.exam_en: He solved the problem by brute force.
He acted like a brute with no self-control.
It was a monumental achievement in science.
The project faced monumental challenges from the start.
examples.exam_ko: 그 프로젝트는 처음부터 엄청난 어려움에 직면했다.
